diagrams.title: Bresenham's Line Algorithm Decision Process
diagrams.description: Shows how the algorithm decides between two candidate pixels at each step based on the decision parameter P
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how Bresenham's algorithm optimally selects pixels to minimize distance from true line

diagrams.title: Scan-line Polygon Fill Algorithm
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how horizontal scan lines intersect polygon edges and fill regions between intersection pairs
elements: Horizontal scan lines at various y-levels
diagrams.purpose: Understanding polygon filling process using scan-line approach

diagrams.title: Aliasing vs Anti-aliasing Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing staircase effect on regular line vs smooth appearance with anti-aliasing
elements: True geometric line vs raster approximation
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the effect of anti-aliasing on line quality
